message:
fix: update stale database names (beads→bd, gastown→gt) causing backup failures

Multiple files hardcoded old database names "beads" and "gastown" instead of
the current names "bd" and "gt", causing the backup dog to fail with "missing
.dolt directories" for 2 of 3 databases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -32,7 +32,7 @@ whether the other layers work.
 
 ```bash
 DOLT_DATA_DIR="$HOME/gt/.dolt-data"
-PROD_DBS=("hq" "bd" "gastown")
+PROD_DBS=("hq" "bd" "gt")
 JSONL_EXPORT_DIR="$HOME/gt/.dolt-archive/jsonl"
 DOLT_HOST="127.0.0.1"
 DOLT_PORT=3307
